evidence_label: public outreach branch routing refresh, not treatment advice
pubmed_query: (transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia OR transfusion dependent thalassemia OR beta thalassemia) AND (gene therapy OR gene editing OR hematopoietic cell transplantation OR exagamglogene OR mitapivat OR luspatercept OR iron overload) AND 2026[pdat]
clinicaltrials_query: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2: beta thalassemia + gene therapy/gene editing/CRISPR/HBG promoter; targeted branch IDs checked

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_hct
guideline_sources.role: route HCT questions to qualified owners, not public eligibility claims

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_gene_manipulation
guideline_sources.role: treat autologous gene-cell therapy as a specialist pathway with collection, conditioning, organ, fertility, follow-up, and access constraints

guideline_sources.label: GeneReviews_beta_thalassemia
guideline_sources.role: frame diagnosis, transfusion, chelation, luspatercept, mitapivat, and monitoring as clinician-owned domains

pubmed_records.title: Current therapeutic landscape of beta-thalassemia: focus on gene therapy.
Is gene therapy a cure for beta-thalassemia?
How I manage luspatercept in transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia.

decision_use: Supports public role/source/registry routing only; blocks public diagnosis, eligibility, treatment selection, referral, trial screening, travel, import, purchase, dosing, transfusion or chelation changes, lab contact, private-message routing, and sample routing.
